(async()=>{document.body.classList.remove('da-blocked');document.documentElement.classList.remove('da-blocked');[...document.body.children].forEach(el=>{const cs=getComputedStyle(el);if(cs.position==='fixed'&&parseInt(cs.zIndex||0)>40)el.remove()});const v=document.getElementById('view-mermas');document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(x=>{if(x!==v)x.classList.remove('active')});v.classList.add('active');let n=v.parentElement;while(n&&n!==document.documentElement){n.classList.remove('hidden');if(getComputedStyle(n).display==='none')n.style.display='block';n=n.parentElement}const l=document.getElementById('listMermas');l.innerHTML=Array.from({length:4},(_,i)=>`
PRODUCTO DE PRUEBA LARGO ${i+1}
775024325303${i}
−40.0undde 50
✓ 10 ya recuperadas⚠ 99d sin resolver
📍 ZONA-0211/7/2026
`).join('');await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,350));const card=l.querySelector('.merma-card');card.scrollIntoView();const r=card.getBoundingClientRect();const shell=[];let a=card;while(a&&a!==document.documentElement){const s2=getComputedStyle(a);if(s2.opacity==='0'||s2.visibility==='hidden'||s2.display==='none')shell.push(a.id||String(a.className).slice(0,40));a=a.parentElement}return{cardW:Math.round(r.width),top:Math.round(r.top),oculto:shell};})()
